User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profile data and gamification stats.

uid.description: The unique identity of the user.

LabProgress.title: Lab Progress
LabProgress.description: Tracks completion and performance for specific labs.

labId.description: Unique identifier for the lab module.

userId.description: The user who owns this progress record.

completed.description: Whether the lab has been finished.

CuratedResource.title: Curated Bio-Eng Topic
CuratedResource.description: Expert-selected technical resources for bio-engineering foundations.

LabConfig.title: Lab Configuration
LabConfig.description: Stores user-specific settings for different lab environments.

labType.description: Type of lab (e.g., mechanical, physics, bridge).

/bio_engineering/{resourceId}.description: Global collection of curated bio-engineering links.

/users/{userId}/progress/{labId}.description: Progress records for specific labs associated with a user.

/users/{userId}/labConfigs/{labType}.description: Customized configurations for each lab type per user.
